name: Employee-is_office_worker
label: Office Worker (no site)
description: When checked, this employee uses the simple office attendance flow in the AKG ESS PWA — no project / activity / task / geofence. Useful for HQ admins, finance, and other staff who never work on a site.

name: Employee-has_petty_cash
label: Has Petty Cash
description: When checked, this employee sees the Petty Cash tab in the AKG ESS PWA (for submitting expense claims and top-up requests, plus reviewing their team's claims if they are a manager). Untick for employees who don't handle company cash.

name: Employee-default_scope_of_work
label: Default Scope of Work
description: Pre-selected in the AKG ESS check-out screen for this employee. They can still pick a different scope at check-out.

name: Project-site_latitude
label: Site Latitude
description: Latitude of the site centre. Used by the ESS app to validate check-ins.

name: Project-site_radius_meters
label: Site Radius (m)
description: Geofence radius in metres. Default 200 m.

name: Employee Checkin-accuracy_m
label: GPS Accuracy (m)
description: GPS horizontal accuracy in metres reported by the client.

name: Employee Checkin-project
label: Project
description: Project the employee was working on at this checkin.

name: Employee Checkin-activity_type
label: Activity Type
description: Activity selected at check-out (OUT rows only).

name: Employee Checkin-scope_of_work
label: Scope of Work
description: Scope of Work selected at check-out (OUT rows only).

name: Employee Checkin-local_id
label: Client Local ID
description: Idempotency key from the offline outbox. Prevents duplicate posts on retry.

name: Leave Application-local_id
label: Client Local ID
description: Idempotency key from the offline outbox.

name: Expense Claim-local_id
label: Client Local ID
description: Idempotency key from the offline outbox.
